calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Jae Un Chung, petitioner in pro per
The petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jae Un Cecilia Chun. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter:June Leathey,CSR# 1629
